title: Cotton Tail
description: A celestial-inspired composition where a floating figure drifts through swirling clouds and vibrant forms, blending fantasy with fluid motion.

title: Rhythm of Contrast
description: Bold strokes of yellow and deep violet collide across textured layers, creating a dynamic play of movement and modern abstraction.

title: Fragmented Persona
description: A stylized face built from sharp geometric shapes and soft pastel tones, reflecting identity through playful abstraction.

title: Beyond the Surface
description: A hidden landscape revealed through a torn wall, symbolizing escape, curiosity, and the journey into the unknown.

title: Fragments of Silence
description: An expressive portrait where melting colors and ink drips reveal emotion, vulnerability, and inner chaos.

title: Sailing Within
description: A mesmerizing macro shot of an eye reflecting a lone sailboat, symbolizing dreams navigating the depths of the soul.

title: Veil of Thoughts
description: A haunting portrait wrapped in swirling smoke, capturing mystery, emotion, and the fragile boundary between clarity and chaos.

title: Quiet Offering
description: A soft, melancholic portrait holding a single rose, blending modern pop style with subtle emotional depth.

title: Hanging by Time
description: A surreal composition of a man suspended from a melting clock, symbolizing the fragile grip we hold on time and the illusion of control over fleeting moments.
